Square mode makes the button icon-only,: Square mode makes the button icon-only, so `aria-label` should describe the action for screen readers.
Loading automatically disables the butto: Loading automatically disables the button and helps prevent repeated submit actions in async scenarios.
Disabled preserves the visual contract o: Disabled preserves the visual contract of the selected variant/tone while turning off interactivity and pointer events.
Ghost variants work best in toolbars and: Ghost variants work best in toolbars and dense action areas where a filled CTA would feel too heavy.
Combine `variant`, `tone`, `size`, and `: Combine `variant`, `tone`, `size`, and `type` to quickly verify the button contract before shipping it to a product scenario.
